title: Questions About Leaks and Internal Sources
summary: Drop #14 suggested the existence of internal whistleblowers or leaks from government agencies. The wording remained intentionally broad.
raw_text:
Why are there leaks?
Who is leaking?
Why now?
Who benefits from controlled leaks?
Q

lines.fact: Government leaks can occur for political, bureaucratic, journalistic, or whistleblower-related reasons.
lines.theory: Followers interpreted leaks as strategic information warfare between intelligence factions.
lines.context: Media leaks were a major feature of reporting during the Trump administration.
lines.questions: What evidence differentiates intentional strategic leaks from unauthorized disclosures?
